_comment: Verifier map for unreachable-surface-purge. Live-app gates use kind:manual; cargo gates use kind:cargo-test; translation parity uses kind:script.

steps: Run: rg -n 'experimental_simplify_mode' src src-tauri
Confirm zero matches outside node_modules, target, dist, and generated build artifacts.
Before launch, hand-edit the on-disk settings.json to include '"experimental_simplify_mode": true' at the top level.
Launch via pwsh scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1.
Open devtools and confirm no red error appears referencing experimental_simplify_mode or settings deserialization.
Open an editor fixture, trigger keep-segment selection by playing the transcript, and confirm playback works without runtime error.
Run: rg -n '"general"' src/i18n/locales
Confirm every match is under the settings parent (e.g. 'settings.general'), never under sidebar.
Run: rg -n 'sidebar\.general|"sidebar":\s*\{[^}]*"general"' src/i18n/locales -U
Confirm zero matches (no sidebar.general orphan remains).
Run: rg -n '"overlay"' src/i18n/locales
Confirm zero matches.
Run: rg -n 'check_apple_intelligence_available' src src-tauri
Confirm zero matches.
Run: rg -n 'appleIntelligence|APPLE_INTELLIGENCE|APPLE_PROVIDER_ID' src src-tauri
Confirm zero matches outside vendored dependencies and target/ or dist/.
Launch via pwsh scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1.
Open Settings and click the Post Process sidebar entry.
Confirm a visible label reads 'Local LLM only - endpoints must be loopback (127.0.0.1 / localhost / ::1)' above or adjacent to the provider form.
In the Post Process panel, confirm the embedded ModelsSettings section renders models filtered to post-processing.
Confirm clicking a model surfaces its settings without a runtime error.
Run: rg -n 'is_local_host' src-tauri/src/llm_client.rs
Confirm at least one match (the loopback enforcement point the UI label cites still exists).
Before launch, ensure settings.json either has 'debug_mode: false' or omits debug_mode.
Launch via pwsh scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1.
Open Settings and confirm the sidebar does NOT show a Debug entry.
With the app running and debug mode off, press Ctrl+Shift+D.
Confirm a Debug entry appears in the sidebar.
Click Debug and confirm the panel renders all four components: DebugPaths, LogLevelSelector, WordCorrectionThreshold, and LogDirectory.
With the Debug section active in the sidebar, press Ctrl+Shift+D to disable debug mode.
Confirm the Debug sidebar entry disappears.
Confirm the active section falls back to a valid section (e.g. editor) without devtools console errors.
